name: Diabetic Sponge Cake
recipeIngredient: 3 Tablespoons Sweet 'n Low or any sugar substitute
recipeInstructions:
1. Separate the eggs.
2. Beat the egg whites with salt until foamy.
3. Add cream of tartar and continue beating until stiff peaks form.
4. In a separate bowl, combine the remaining ingredients and mix well.
5. Gently fold in the beaten egg whites into the batter.
6. Grease and flour a bundt pan.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 40 minutes or longer, testing with a toothpick.
8. Serve with unsweetened jelly (all fruit) and Cool Whip.
